atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports increased fatigue.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports difficulty keeping up with his usual bike rides.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports his usual bike rides are now limited to approximately 20-30 miles.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports his friend, Tyler, is faster and often waits for him.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports observing pursed lip breathing.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a habit noticed by his wife and previously noted by other physicians.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a palpable nodule in his right testicular area.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is currently taking vitamin D3 (5000 units on Sundays).

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is currently taking clindamycin prior to dental procedures.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has received both doses of the COVID-19 vaccine.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's alkaline phosphatase level is elevated at 156.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Lung field examination reveals pursed lip breathing.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Right testicular nodule is approximately 2-3 millimeters palpable.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician observes pursed lip breathing and low exhalation

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician reports raising concern for potential respiratory dysfunction

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The elevated alkaline phosphatase level warrants further investigation

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The elevated alkaline phosphatase level suspects bone or liver pathology

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The testicular nodule requires urological evaluation

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is advised to return for a wellness visit in one year

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends the patient receive the shingles vaccine

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends the patient complete the MMR series

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders an echocardiogram

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a stress test

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A referral to cardiology with Dr. Vincent Sanchez has been arranged

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A pulmonary function test has been ordered

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A urology consultation has been scheduled for evaluation of the testicular nodule
